semantic.role: Package manifest for the ArchSpine project, defining the project metadata, CLI entry points, build/test/release scripts, and dependency tree.
responsibilities: CLI entry points and command routing (spine, archspine)
Build pipeline compilation and development workflows
Unit, e2e, schema validation test suites
Published file whitelist for npm distribution
invariants: Package type is ES module (type: module)
Only files in dist/, schemas/, docs/, README*, LICENSE, CHANGELOG.md, CONTRIBUTING.md are published
All CLI scripts must be built before execution
CI pipeline requires successful build, unit, schema, and e2e tests

English.role: Package manifest for the ArchSpine project, defining the project metadata, CLI entry points, build/test/release scripts, and dependency tree.

parameter_definitions.name: Unique package identifier, used by npm for publishing and dependency resolution.
parameter_definitions.version: Semantic version controlling release lifecycle; changes trigger CI and publishing gates.
parameter_definitions.description: Human-readable project purpose, appears in npm search and documentation.
parameter_definitions.main: Primary module entry point for programmatic usage; affects how other modules import this package.
parameter_definitions.bin: Defines two CLI commands (`spine` and `archspine`) linked to the same built script, enabling user interaction.
parameter_definitions.type: Sets module system to ES modules, affecting import/export syntax compatibility with Node.js.
parameter_definitions.engines: Declares minimum Node.js version; npm will warn or block installation on incompatible runtimes.
parameter_definitions.files: Whitelist of files/folders included in npm publish, controlling distribution size and excluding internal artifacts.
parameter_definitions.scripts: Defines 20+ lifecycle hooks controlling build, test, validation, release, and CLI operations; misconfiguration breaks the entire pipeline.
parameter_definitions.dependencies: Runtime packages required for operation; each addition or update affects audit, size, and security surface.
parameter_definitions.devDependencies: Development-only tools (TypeScript, ESLint, Vitest, etc.); not shipped to users but critical for CI reliability.

English.stability_and_risks: This package.json is the single source of truth for the project's build, test, and release pipeline. Any inconsistency between scripts and actual tooling (e.g., missing dependencies, wrong Node version) will break CI and developer workflows. The locked Node engine (>=20) ensures modern features but may cause incompatibility with older deployment environments. The files whitelist prevents accidental leakage of internal tests or source maps, but must be kept in sync with actual build output. Dependency ranges are not pinned (no lockfile shown), increasing risk of breaking changes from transitive updates. The extensive script suite provides high automation but demands careful version coordination between tools (e.g., vitest, TypeScript, ESLint).

Simplified Chinese.role: ArchSpine 项目的包清单，定义项目元数据、CLI 入口点、构建/测试/发布脚本以及依赖树。

parameter_definitions.name: 唯一的包标识符，用于 npm 发布和依赖解析。
parameter_definitions.version: 语义化版本号控制发布生命周期；版本变化会触发 CI 和发布门禁。
parameter_definitions.description: 人类可读的项目用途说明，显示在 npm 搜索和文档中。
parameter_definitions.main: 程序化使用的主模块入口点，影响其他模块如何导入此包。
parameter_definitions.bin: 定义两个 CLI 命令（`spine` 和 `archspine`）链接到同一构建脚本，使用户可以交互。
parameter_definitions.type: 将模块系统设置为 ES 模块，影响与 Node.js 的 import/export 语法兼容性。
parameter_definitions.engines: 声明最低 Node.js 版本；在不兼容的运行时上 npm 会警告或阻止安装。
parameter_definitions.files: npm 发布时包含的文件/文件夹白名单，控制分发包大小并排除内部工件。
parameter_definitions.scripts: 定义 20 多个生命周期钩子，控制构建、测试、验证、发布和 CLI 操作；配置错误会破坏整个流水线。
parameter_definitions.dependencies: 运行所需的依赖包；每次添加或更新都会影响审计、大小和安全面。
parameter_definitions.devDependencies: 开发工具（TypeScript、ESLint、Vitest 等）；不随用户包发布，但对 CI 可靠性至关重要。

Simplified Chinese.stability_and_risks: 此 package.json 是项目构建、测试和发布流水线的唯一真相来源。脚本与实际工具之间的任何不一致（例如缺少依赖、Node 版本错误）都会破坏 CI 和开发者工作流。锁定的 Node 引擎（>=20）确保现代特性，但可能与较旧的部署环境不兼容。文件白名单防止内部测试或源映射意外泄漏，但必须与实际的构建输出保持同步。依赖范围未固定（未显示 lockfile），增加了来自传递更新的破坏性变更风险。广泛的脚本套件提供了高度自动化，但要求工具（如 vitest、TypeScript、ESLint）之间的版本协调必须精确。
